=====Temporary=====
During the post-game, Hau catches a {{p|Blacephalon}}{{sup/7|US}}/{{p|Stakataka}}{{sup/7|UM}} at [[Poni Grove]] and immediately afterwards gives it to the [[Ultra Recon Squad]] to be researched.
